notes: LUTs are normal arrays and rely on hardware caches; no explicit register/shared-memory placement is used.
FP8 and FP16 outputs are opaque uint8/uint16 payloads, so results measure index unpack + LUT load + output store, not arithmetic conversion.
packed_index_lut is the main packed-codebook-index path; aligned_index_lut isolates LUT load/store with uint16 indices.
